creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Brian from comment #0)

A non-failing B0T context example . . .

RPi4B B0T with 8 GiBytes with 14.1-RELEASE dd'd to microsd card, put
in slot, and boot attempted: work just fine. "shutdown -r now" then
attempted. Worked just fine.

I'll see about a 4 GiByte one and see what happens using the same
media.
